textByHash.00fdf0049270e35f4786fd531f5b0ae16c498a03: Ah, hello there! I've just dug up an old treasure chest of mine.
textByHash.12f562375cef0b190ba9079017d07ec2f07e83ba: Arrr! I'd better find someone else.
textByHash.257c507daf58fb67118a40ee9f63d9d2172a9ebe: Problem is, these old hands o'mine aren't as useful as they used t'be, and the lock on that chest is a little bit too fiddly for ol' Cap'n Arnav. Could you help me out?
textByHash.2982348795a4097f89425569b0624a58d45d0025: Arrr! That be nowhere near close! Did ye not listen the first time around?
textByHash.4ea6c8a2c1223d7b9d97735fc570a39db6d6a761: When the items in the middle row all match the words written under the column then you'll have solved the lock.
textByHash.74b7d983ecadf895f95f4bb1ea323e5961918a4f: There are three columns. What you need to do for me is to match up each picture with the word underneath the column, and then unlock the chest.
textByHash.7684e8c45715b9a2c3e66f5718b1496efbc1bbaf: Ah, hello there, lassie! I've just dug up an old treasure chest of mine.
textByHash.a310c106eb6984a343a6a9a6688f38538e844066: Shiver me' timbers, are you ignoring me?
textByHash.af4963530f77d30a82e0efcdd180611154fbee88: Ah, well done matey, that's the right combination. Here, have a little somethin' for helpin' me out.
textByHash.be2c5c6ec412390cc6504cafd899d9bd415af3bf: Ah, hello there, laddie! I've just dug up an old treasure chest of mine.
textByHash.cbc1c15365a7a9759a57d680a63d54b6482ece6a: I knows somethin' you should knows.
textByHash.db72d1ad6d071deeb115bdb3bc5010173fd3b56f: Arrr, you're not the person I be needin'.
textByHash.df8af2fcaa93d088183e68502bb0fdc7f86d7c06: Right, right. What you need to do is click on the arrows to roll the cylinders round to the different items.
textByHash.e633709341ff081beabee0eb137f1272577d987a: Parley wi' me, my old fruit!
textByHash.f866e5b7f19188541d3cca061211c60b05a48be9: Will ye help an old pirate?
